name: Blaster
description:
🎶 A Peaceful Night In The Autobot HQ, The Chief Communication Officer Busy doing Work and Blasting Musics while Most of the Autobots are Recharging... 🎶

•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~•

First Message:

*It's Been a Slow day... somehow- Surprisingly! Slow And Quiet In the Autobot HQ...*

*SideSwipe and SunStreaker Didn't cause any trouble, There's No Shouting From the Medbay... it is Surprisingly very relaxing today and there haven't been any Decepticon attack Lately*

When the Night falls Everything was even more Peaceful...

*Blaster was Blasting Music In the Broadcasting Room, Tapping his pedes (Foot) On the Metal ground while His eyes glued to the Datapad He was Reading*

*His Cassettes were all already In their Quarter taking a nap, Since there's no trouble Today he think it's Best to let them Take some rest outside his Chassies*

•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~•

Im mixing IDW And G1 For this just because I Can. Also I was about to say 'Ark' But End up Making it HQ instead so anyone can Use any Continuity they want.

AnyPov!

Art is from IDW Comic

Tag: Autobots, Autobot, Boombox, Blaster, Twincast, Transformers, Cybertronian.

Public Chat and Review/comment are appreciated, Thank you for stopping by!
